titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 109: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 109. (A.R. No. 181 of 1974.) TĀMARAIPPĀKKAM, CHENGAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Agnīśvara temple.

It records the allotment made from the sālābhōgam at Pagaippūṇḍi for the provision of three plates (kalam) ie for feeding three brāhmaṇas as uttamāgram in the temple of Mahādēva at Tāmaraippākkam by Vayiri Attimallan alias Kaṉnaradēva Piridiyaṅgaraiyaṉ, who was the chief of Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uṭaiyār kopparakecaripanmarkki yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu paṅkaḷanāṭuṭaiya vayiri Attimallanākiya kaṉnarateva piritiyaṅkaraiyaneṉ paṅkaḷanāṭṭu tāmaraippākkamuṭaiya mahādevarkku Uttamāgram(ma) kalamiThe letter ‘la’ is engraved below ‘mi’ (i)raṇṭum Atirāman vai
kalam monṟum Āka kalam muṉṟukkum nittam Arici Aṟu nāḻiyum Uḻakkāḻākku neyyum kaṟi Āṟum Eṇṇai Uḻakkāḻākkum veṟuṅkāyāṟum veṟṟilai panniraṇṭum cantirātittiya(ā)vaṟ celappuRead cantirātittiyavaṟ cellakaipūṇṭi cālāpokattil vaitta nimantattiṉ nittamippaṭiyum niman(t)tañ celuttuvatāka vaittuk kuṭutteṉ kannaratevappiruti kaṅkaraiyaṉeṉ Itu Iṟakkuvān kaṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai Eḻunūṟṟukkāta māṟṟār ceyta pāvattai paṭuvāṉ Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai Āṉaimaṅkala muṭaiyān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
